{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032318583455EE1EBC528C9CCDD24A"}"},"total":1199},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7428407561814819608","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我觉得这是除绍宋之外，我看的另外一本穿越到宋朝很好看的文章了，虽然没有绍宋写的那么好，但是因为角度的不同，也不失是一本好的文章，值得一看，看着非常的爽，非常的舒服。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1729565340,"group_id":"7376936347275119641","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwAvmfmO4jnlQHJHTlfBtmA=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b9264818a8e64683abff2b7ab8ce2e7a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794343&x-signature=RmkgDM0pMtqz68h3VYHXEGr50EQ%3D","user_id":"607360765925587","user_name":"Cx330的小明"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"607360765925587","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7376936347275119641","book_info":{"abstract":"王伦意外穿越到了水浒世界，成为梁山泊第一任大首领、同名同姓的白衣秀士。
青楼天子、道君皇帝不坐龙床坐花床，四大奸臣扰乱朝纲，百姓苦不聊生，恶邻女真虎视眈眈。
王伦：“这弱宋不扶也罢！”
鲁智深：“这世道颠倒黑白，举世皆浊，就比俺的直裰染做皂了，洗杀怎得干净。”
李逵：“且杀去东京，夺了皇帝老儿的鸟位，让王伦哥哥做皇帝，众兄弟都做将军！”
众好汉：“反了，反了！”
……
若干年后，王伦黄袍加身，君临天下！
平大辽，灭金国，代弱宋，东服高丽，西收西域，南定越南占城，日本称臣纳贡，华夏人在天竺为婆罗门！
王伦意气风发：“众人同心，其利断金！朕要打下一个大大的疆土，重现汉唐荣耀！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9dc9599a1eaae6e40444e67728c7a40d","author":"万人丛中一回首","author_id":"","book_id":"7376936347275119641","book_name":"夺宋：水浒也称王","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":501,"name":"宋朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=501&name=宋朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7376968789440610841","read_count":"15974","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2463130"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"1221","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,宋朝","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2of36339686cabd5c00d9dd3699b35d24d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779447515&x-signature=XKdaURNrauqd1Q7Qn1Jlp3UXmd8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"147766398159395","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"622"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032318583455EE1EBC528C9CCDD24A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读24小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":86466,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":10074},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id 李逵：“且杀去东京，夺了皇帝老儿的鸟位，让王伦哥哥做皇帝，众兄弟都做将军！”

……
若干年后，王伦黄袍加身，君临天下！

王伦意气风发：“众人同心，其利断金！朕要打下一个大大的疆土，重现汉唐荣耀！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9dc9599a1eaae6e40444e67728c7a40d","author":"万人丛中一回首","author_id":"","book_id":"7376936347275119641","book_name":"夺宋：水浒也称王","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":501,"name":"宋朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=501&name=宋朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7376968789440610841","read_count":"15974","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2463130"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"1221","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,宋朝","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2of36339686cabd5c00d9dd3699b35d24d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779447515&x-signature=XKdaURNrauqd1Q7Qn1Jlp3UXmd8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"147766398159395","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"75"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032318583455EE1EBC528C9CCDD24A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读59分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":59,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3560,"reply_count":28,"show_pv":82857},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7555450488546788121","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的不错，本书前期写的是以水浒为主的故事，从中期到后期写的都是帝国开疆拓土的故事，无论内容，还是写作手法前期和中后期完全感觉是两本书。很多内容作者都有查阅各类资料，写的很详细。但就是因为太详细了，很多时候会导致故事的代入感很弱，有时的资料内容就占了大半章章节，有部分章节感觉就像在看文献。不过总体而言本书还是好看的。希望作者继续努力加油。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1759143774,"group_id":"7376936347275119641","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/YVw2CywfHl2KxQYCNgZ9sZ3Zt3THkmxDqLscz996D4","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2175273187412100","user_name":"飞羽飞鹰"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2175273187412100","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7376936347275119641","book_info":{"abstract":"王伦意外穿越到了水浒世界，成为梁山泊第一任大首领、同名同姓的白衣秀士。
